title: othocallis ingridiae
side_effects: Othocallis ingridiae can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing nausea, headaches, and dizziness due to the high concentration of toxic compounds. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to liver damage and kidney problems, as the plant's active ingredients can interfere with the body's natural detoxification processes. In severe cases, improper use of Othocallis ingridiae can cause respiratory failure, seizures, and even coma. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using this plant for any health benefits.
